hero.heading: Protect What Matters
hero.subheading: Expert security recommendations, drills, and assessments for corporations, schools, and high-net-worth individuals.

sections.title: Security Best Practices Overview
sections.description: Watch our overview of the most critical security practices every organization should implement immediately.

sections.title: How We Conduct Security Assessments
sections.text:
Our security assessments begin with a comprehensive walkthrough of your facility. We identify physical vulnerabilities, evaluate access control, review emergency exit routes, and interview key staff. You receive a prioritized written report with clear, actionable recommendations ranked by urgency and cost.

Every assessment covers three core areas:

1. **Physical Security** – perimeter, entry points, surveillance coverage
2. **Personnel Protocols** – staff awareness, visitor management, incident response
3. **Emergency Preparedness** – evacuation plans, communication chains, drill schedules

sections.title: Active Shooter Drill Training
sections.caption: Our certified trainers conduct realistic, controlled drills tailored to your facility layout and staff composition.
sections.altText: Security professionals conducting an active shooter drill in a corporate office environment

sections.title: Top 5 Recommendations for Workplace Safety

sections.title: Ready to Strengthen Your Security?
sections.text:
Contact us today to schedule a free initial consultation. We serve organizations of all sizes across the tri-state area and beyond. Our team is available Monday–Friday 9am–6pm and Saturday–Sunday 11am–5pm.

**Phone:** (347) 726-8382
**Email:** info@spartanexecutiveconsultant.com
